Overview

Experienced software engineer based in New York City with years of experience designing, developing, testing, and maintaining software across the full-stack. Passionate about building robust systems, data engineering, and learning new technologies. Previous experiences with both seed-stage startups and hyper-scale tech companies.

Experiences

Software Engineer

Dec. 2021 - Present
Bezel, New York [seed-stage startup]
  • Led backend efforts among a team of four engineers in building an authenticated luxury watch marketplace.
  • Architected and developed real-time offer and counter-offer functionality for marketplace buyers and sellers, enabling direct negotiations, seamless transactions, and a reduced need for Bezel’s intervention in driving sales to completion.
  • Streamlined Bezel’s inventory ingestion process by deploying a web crawler using Ruby on Rails which periodically discovered and ingested new inventory on 10+ seller’s websites, reducing the weekly workload for internal teams by dozens of hours.
  • Integrated backend (Java/Jersey) with Google Cloud Pub/Sub to facilitate asynchronous service-to-service communication and guarantee message delivery.
  • Optimized the performance and accuracy of ElasticSearch by improving document modeling, tuning queries, and judiciously applying filters, resulting in a 30% improvement in speed.
  • Automated a process to sync 1000s of watches on Bezel’s platform with data on seller’s websites to keep Bezel inventory up-to-date by building a web scraper using Ruby on Rails.
  • Elevated the purchasing experience by building a discount codes feature and integrating discounts with Refersion to enable affiliate marketing which added value to customers while expanding marketing reach.
  • Built dynamic web pages for the inventory listing, landing, offers, and search experiences using Next.js (React framework.)
  • Improved the process of product feed management by writing a job to automatically aggregate all watch inventory data via SQL query and SFTP transferring it to a 3rd-party daily.
  • Modified payments experience using Stripe API to allow for holds on wire purchases to lower the incidence of unpaid orders.

Software Engineer

Mar. 2020 - Dec. 2021
Amazon Web Services [AWS], Remote
  • Spearheaded full-stack development efforts to introduce the QuickSight Just-in-Time Provisioning feature, streamlining user onboarding and enhancing security for tens of thousands of enterprise customers utilizing IDP-Initiated Federation.
  • Implemented backend (Java/Spring) for QuickSight folders which introduced a hierarchical structure to asset management to elevate AWS’s leading business intelligence tool.
  • Maintained operational efforts among a team of 10 developers by writing dozens of security test suites, creating alarms for all team APIs, and compiling runbooks to ensure the continued uptime of first-mile user onboarding.
  • Prototyped and deployed the QuickSight Favorited Folders feature, allowing for immediate access to users’ most relevant data with adoption rates of 100+ users/week.
  • Designed and developed frontend ReactJS components for QuickSight Folders and JIT Provisioning projects.

Software Engineering Intern

May 2019 - August 2019
Dallas, Texas
  • Engineered ReactJS/Java Spring application with live Pivotal Gemfire data integration for fleet-wide management of 4000+ flights a day.
  • Launched development on a business-important ReactJS/Java (Spring) app to optimize internal non-revenue travel for 65000+ employees.

Backend Developer

May 2018 - August 2018
Austin, Texas
  • Sole backend developer and data scientist for Base Operations in the Techstars Austin Impact program.
  • Developed and maintained a Flask RESTful API.
  • Deployed and scaled multiple web applications with AWS Elastic Beanstalk.
  • Gained extensive experience with AWS RDS, EC2, S3, and Cognito.
  • Integrated 3rd-party communication via Twilio and SendGrid.
  • Implemented Google Firebase’s Cloud Messaging, Realtime Database, and User Authentication.
  • Leveraged Segment to track various end-user analytics.

Projects

TriviaTexter - A backend project leveraging the Twilio API to periodically text users trivia questions sourced from the web.
Recipes - A full-stack webapp where users can curate a collection of recipes on top of the MealDB.
Cipher - A full-stack webapp where users can generate passwords for websites using the website's domain name and a base password as keys for the Vigenère cipher.
